webpage_section.section_description: Text content area of the second card, containing a heading, description paragraph, and a CTA button on a light blue background

difference_1.element_description: Card text content container with heading, body text, and CTA button
difference_1.computed_style_change: padding-top: 20px vs 0px; padding-bottom: 20px vs 32px; padding-left/right: 20px vs 24px
difference_1.difference: The original card text area has uniform 20px padding. The migrated version has 0px top padding (text sits flush at top), 32px bottom padding, and 24px horizontal padding. The text content also differs (original: 'Spring Sipping Starts Here' wine offer; migrated: 'Saga Health Insurance' policy offer).
